title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body: Three high-severity reports resolved: (1) spam_wave_42 banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels; (2) toxic_runner banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers; (3) report against core_maintainer closed as false positive (mass report by brigading users). Trusted members were not sanctioned. Remaining medium/low reports (003, 004, 005) are queued for follow-up.
